title: Laundry treating apparatus
abstract: A laundry treating apparatus comprising an induction module is disclosed. The laundry treating apparatus comprises a cabinet, a drum provided inside the cabinet and formed of a metal material for accommodating a treatment target, and an induction module spaced apart from an outer circumferential surface of the drum at a predetermined interval, inducing and heating the drum, wherein the induction module includes a base housing for accommodating a coil, a permanent magnet housing coupled with the base housing and provided with a holder in which a permanent magnet is accommodated, and a cover housing coupled with the permanent magnet housing, and the cover housing is coupled to the permanent magnet housing and therefore the permanent magnet is located between the permanent magnet housing and the cover housing. A joint force of the induction module may be enhanced to improve durability, and noise caused by vibration of a tub may be avoided.
claims: Claims ( 20 ) A laundry treating apparatus comprising: a cabinet; a drum provided inside the cabinet and formed of a metal material for accommodating a treatment target; and an induction module spaced apart from an outer circumferential surface of the drum at a predetermined interval, inducing and heating the drum, wherein the induction module includes: a base housing for accommodating a coil; a permanent magnet housing coupled with the base housing and provided with a holder in which a permanent magnet is accommodated; and a cover housing coupled with the permanent magnet housing, and the cover housing is coupled to the permanent magnet housing and therefore the permanent magnet is located between the permanent magnet housing and the cover housing. The laundry treating apparatus of claim 1, wherein the holder includes supports provided below the holder, supporting the permanent magnet. The laundry treating apparatus of claim 2, wherein the holder further includes: an opening portion into which the permanent magnet is inserted; and a barrier extended from a circumference of the opening portion to a lower portion of the opening portion, accommodating the permanent magnet. The laundry treating apparatus of claim 3, wherein the permanent magnet is inserted into the opening portion from an upper portion of the permanent magnet housing. The laundry treating apparatus of claim 3, wherein the supports are formed to be inwardly protruded from a lower portion of the barrier to an inner side thereof, and are provided to be spaced from each other at a predetermined interval. The laundry treating apparatus of claim 2, wherein the permanent magnet housing includes a connector for connecting the holder. The laundry treating apparatus of claim 6, wherein the connector further includes a through portion for passing through the connector up and down. The laundry treating apparatus of claim 7, wherein the connector connects the holder at an upper portion of the holder. The laundry treating apparatus of claim 8, wherein the connector connects the holder at a front end of an upper portion of the barrier. The laundry treating apparatus of claim 7, wherein the connector is connected from a lower portion of the holder. The laundry treating apparatus of claim 1, wherein any one of the base housing and the permanent magnet housing is provided with a ring, and the other one of the base housing and the permanent magnet housing is provided with a hook jointed to the ring. The laundry treating apparatus of claim 11, wherein the ring is provided at a rim of any one of the base housing and the permanent magnet housing, and the hook is provided at a rim of the other one of the base housing and the permanent magnet housing and therefore the base housing and the permanent magnet housing are provided to be detached from each other. The laundry treating apparatus of claim 1, wherein any one of the permanent magnet housing and the cover housing is provided with a groove, and the other one of the permanent magnet housing and the cover housing is provided with a hook jointed to the groove. The laundry treating apparatus of claim 13, wherein the hook is provided in a plural number, and the plural hooks are provided in the same direction. The laundry treating apparatus of claim 1, wherein each of the base housing, the permanent magnet housing and the cover housing has a joint to which a screw is jointed, and the joint is provided with a long hole. The laundry treating apparatus of claim 15, wherein the permanent magnet housing is fixed to the base housing at an upper portion of the base housing, and the cover housing is fixed to the permanent magnet housing at the upper portion of the permanent magnet housing. The laundry treating apparatus of claim 16, further comprising a tub provided inside the cabinet, accommodating the drum, wherein the tub includes a tub joint formed to be protruded on an outer circumferential surface, and the joint and the tub joint are jointed to each other by a screw and therefore the induction module is fixed to the outer circumferential surface of the tub The laundry treating apparatus of claim 1, wherein a clamp for fixing the permanent magnet is provided at a lower portion of the cover housing. The laundry treating apparatus of claim 18, wherein the clamp is elastically supported at the lower portion of the cover housing and therefore is in contact with the permanent magnet. The laundry treating apparatus of claim 18, wherein the clamp is formed to be protruded from the lower portion of the cover housing and is in contact with the permanent magnet.
